doctor.template: Run `./claw-spice doctor` and summarize missing host or container requirements.

examples.template: Run `./claw-spice examples run --skip-sim` first. If Docker LTspice is built and available, run `./claw-spice examples run`. Summarize generated artifacts and measurements.

show-schematic.description: Render and open an LTspice schematic.
show-schematic.template: Run `./claw-spice show $ARGUMENTS` to render and open the schematic. If a terminal-only check is more appropriate, run `./claw-spice show $ARGUMENTS --terminal`.

test.template: Run `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py'` locally, or `./claw-spice test` when the Docker image is built.
